expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, and visible failure or recovery outcomes
expectations.evidence: The output enumerates the three required focus areas, but does not actually demonstrate they are covered by an enforced shipment checkpoint; it marks them as unassessable: "Status: BLOCKED — cannot assess / cannot demonstrate compliance" and the matrix shows each item as "BLOCKED" ("no evidence / no SKILL.md"). Therefore the case focus is not explicitly covered in delivered checkpoint content.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: While the document labels "Primary phase under test: phase5b", it explicitly states it cannot verify phase5b contract/artifacts: "Status: BLOCKED" and "Cannot confirm which artifacts are required at phase5b... because `./skill_snapshot/SKILL.md` is unavailable" and "Output aligns with primary phase phase5b | Yes | BLOCKED (cannot validate phase model contract)". So alignment is not demonstrated.
